name: djule
description: Syntax highlighting, diagnostics, autocomplete, and navigation for Djule templates.

djule.pythonCommand.description: Optional Python command used by the Djule VS Code extension for live syntax diagnostics. Leave empty to use the workspace-selected interpreter.

djule.liveSyntax.description: Enable live Djule lexer/parser diagnostics while editing .djule files.

djule.projectRoot.description: Optional absolute path to the Djule project root. Use this if automatic root detection does not find the local src/djule package.

djule.djangoSettingsModule.description: Optional Django settings module override for auto-discovering context-processor globals and globally registered simple tags inside Djule files.

djule.globals.description: Optional Djule global symbol schema used to extend or override auto-discovered Django globals for diagnostics and autocomplete. Example: { "VITE_DEV_HOST": "Vite host from a Django context processor", "request": { "detail": "Django request", "members": { "path": "Request path", "user": { "members": { "username": "Username", "is_authenticated": "Auth flag" } } } } }
